tenants.description: Every tenant your account has access to. Click a tenant to switch into it, or create a new one — you become its owner automatically.

table.deleteSelfTitle: Switch to another tenant before deleting this one

delete.title: Delete this tenant?
delete.descriptionSuffix: . Audit history is preserved, but you won't be able to undo this from the UI.
delete.descriptionFallback: This soft-deletes the tenant. Audit history is preserved.

create.title: New workspace
create.description: You'll become the owner of this workspace and switch into it once it's created.
create.name: Name
create.slugHelp: Lowercase letters, numbers, dashes. Used in URLs.

edit.title: Edit tenant
edit.description: Slug can't be changed once a tenant is created.
edit.name: Name
edit.statusHelp: Use the Delete action to soft-delete a tenant.

domains.description: Prove ownership of your email domains to enable organization SSO and just-in-time provisioning. Add a DNS TXT record, then verify.

addCard.title: Add a domain
addCard.description: Enter the email domain your members use, e.g. acme.com.
addCard.label: Domain

domains.emptyDescription: Add a domain above to start the verification flow.

card.dnsInstructions: Add this TXT record to your DNS, then click Verify. Changes can take a few minutes to propagate.

members.description: Users who are members of this organisation.
